TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Rick_Adelman, title = Rick_Adelman, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rick_Adelman} }

S.FORM: == Rick Adelman == 1 bulad 16 demiad, 1946 a mihca, Rick Adelman, miunduay. Donald L. Adamse nalecuhan i Lynwood, California, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput. Rick Adelman i 1968 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 7 ku uwac atu silsil 79, namapili' tu nu San Diego Rockets putiput.
S.PHON: == *i ¶k ad…ôr~…æman == * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, *i ¶k ad…ôr~…æman, miunduaj. donar~…æd r~…æ. adams…ô nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i r~…æjnwood, ¶ar~…æifornia, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput. *i ¶k ad…ôr~…æman i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu san di…ôgo *o ¶k…ôts putiput.
S.FORM: == Rick Adelman == 1 bulad 16 demiad, 1946 a mihca, Rick Adelman, miunduay. Donald L. Adamse nalecuhan i Lynwood, California, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput. Rick Adelman i 1968 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 7 ku uwac atu silsil 79, namapili' tu nu San Diego Rockets putiput.
S.PHON: == *i ¶k ad…ôr~…æman == * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, *i ¶k ad…ôr~…æman, miunduaj. donar~…æd r~…æ. adams…ô nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i r~…æjnwood, ¶ar~…æifornia, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput. *i ¶k ad…ôr~…æman i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu san di…ôgo *o ¶k…ôts putiput.
